title: SquirrelPAK 1201
description: Tech heavy mod PAK that is customized for quick pickup play the SquirrelCraft way now on Modrinth
body:
# SquirrelPAK 1201

Welcome to Team SquirrelCraft's first SquirrelPAK on Modrinth! 

> tl;dr: Tech Squirrels! - A 1.20.1 tech mod pack by Team SquirrelCraft that is aimed for the player that has limited time to play so we have slightly OP mods and settings. Note you need at least 6G of RAM, 8 GB the best, so make sure you set the ram usage! 

### Whats a SquirrelPAK?
Welcome to Team SquirrelCraft's first SquirrelPAK on Modrinth! If your new to SquirrelPAKs they are mod packs made for folks who don't have a lot of time to play and may short attention spans! With this in mind we try to select mods and settings that make it little easier to get started and progress quickly.

### About This PAK
SquirrelPAK 1201 is the culmination of our Let's Play MC20 in 2024. We took all the best mods we played through and tried to keep the mod count low. Each SquirrelPAK has the following formula. Client Side Life Improvement mods + Map Mod + Vanilla Plus Mods + Builders Blocks Mod + Early & Late game Storage Mods + Early & Late game Energy Mods + Med/High Tech Mods + Server Tools and favorite mods that the SquirrelFam loves.

#### Highlighted Mods

*Not all mods listed for full list see mod list*

* Life Improvement/Easy Mode mods
    *  Simple Voice Chat / JIE / Jade
    *  Easy Villagers, Mobs, Farming
    *  Starter Kit / Starter Structure 
*  Map Mod
    *  Journey Map
*  Vanilla Plus Mods
    *  Farmers Delight 
*  Builders Blocks/Tools
    *  All Macaws Mods 
*  Storage Mods
    *  Early: Backpacks / Func Storage / Iron Chests / Bag of Yurting
    *  Late: AE2 / Mekanism
*  Energy Mods
    *  Early: Solar Flux / Andv Generators
    *  Late: Extreme Reactors/Mekanism
*  Med/High Tech Mods:
    *  Industrial Foregoing  / RFTools 
    *  EnderIO / Mekanism / Thermal 
*  Server Tools
    *  Prometheus / Argonauts
    *  Heracles / Cadmus
    *  Advanced Backups / Lightmans Currency 
    *  Maint Mode
*  SquirrelFam Favs
    *  Ad Astra
    *  Create

## Engage With Us

For issues with the PAK raise an issue or question on our GitHub page. The source for the mod pack can also be found there

https://github.com/SquirrelCraft/SquirrelPAKs
